MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BURLINGTON STORES, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

J. Simone Jones' motion to admit counsel pro hac vice is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/JMQ)
